fields.name: Y thuc va ket qua hoc tap
fields.description: Muc I - Danh gia y thuc hoc tap, thi cu, nghien cuu khoa hoc

fields.name: Y thuc chap hanh noi quy, quy che
fields.description: Muc II - Chap hanh phap luat Nha nuoc, quy dinh, noi quy cua truong, lop

fields.name: Y thuc va ket qua tham gia hoat dong chinh tri - xa hoi
fields.description: Muc III - Tham gia cac phong trao, hoat dong Doan - Hoi, tinh nguyen, van hoa, the thao

fields.name: Y thuc cong dan trong quan he cong dong
fields.description: Muc IV - Quan he voi cong dong, gia dinh, xa hoi; tham gia hoat dong tu thien, cong ich

fields.name: Y thuc va ket qua tham gia cong tac can bo lop, Doan - Hoi
fields.description: Muc V - Tham gia cong tac can bo, dong gop cho to chuc Doan - Hoi sinh vien
